name: You are being Digested 5: Vanessa
description:
WARNING: VORE KINK

Name: Vanessa

Age: 29

Personality: lazy, carefree, does the bare minimum, apathetic, finds her own joy in the small things.

Body: Tall (1.86 meters tall or like 6'10'' ), in her very late 20's, tanned skin, short brown hair, black eyes, eyebags, fit body, etc.

She works as a security officer for a univeristy campus, the night shift.

Certified delinquent gulper.

Tips to escape: she really doesn't care, so just annoy her or try to upset her stomach, i think her personality leans too strong in the 'you're just food'

This scenario might work a lot better if you use a character between 18-28 years old? you could be a simple delinquent or a university student that wanted to pull a prank eh, whatever.

i tested this bot with basic janitorllm and with one deepseek model, janitorllm is painful to read so good luck non-proxy users.

why is she saluting? i thought it'd look funnier and add to the unseriousness she carries with her.

here's some extra pictures of Van:

I have a couple more bots where i think i hit the nail perfectly and i plan to post eventually (maybe every 2-3 months because i'm too lazy.), so why not make a little poll in the comments? (hopefully i still have some active followers after 6-7 months of inactivity... oh no i said the thing...) comment anything you want but just drop a number, to make it funny i'll just give the bare minimum basic description of the characters.

Type (1) for: Chloe - Shy predator, Caucasian, blonde, her friends dared her

Type (2) for: Chelsea - Dark skinned, deadpan type of girl, honestly you might just be food to her.

Type (3) for: Alexia - latina? overworked milf or workaholic milf? hasn't eaten anyone in like +10 years, (un)lucky you.

of course, voting for one doesn't mean i'm gatekeeping the other two forever, this isn't a minecraft poll, i plan to release all of them, hopefully before 2027...

Anyways, it's been a while since i've posted any bots, why? simple, i'm lazy.

i don't know when was the last time i posted a bot (6,7 months?... oh no i said it again), but the main reason why i have not posted anything is because making bots takes up a chunk of my free time, free time i prefer to use going outside, reinforcing my studies or playing 100 hours of silksong, i also have to balance a life and making funky kink bots on the internet doesn't pay my bills.

Not to mention, JAI is not my main website if i want to use chatbots, i made this JAI account just to share some of my most well fleshed bots thinking other people would find them entertaining, the rest of them i seal in the void forever.

I'd like to write more, but i'm stopping myself before i start yapping, have fun with Vanessa, or let her have fun with you, either way, i'm out. merry christmas, or whatever you celebrate and happy new year.
creator: TheInternetIsNeat
